subject: fix: resolve remaining codebase review issues (round 4)
body:
Address all outstanding items from the 48-file codebase review:

- Replace hardcoded #FFFFFF with LightTheme.textOnPrimary across 8 files
- Fix Math.min(...spread) crash risk in StationCard and StationList sort
- Extract inline styles to StyleSheet in StationList and admin index
- Add shared ErrorState component, replace duplicated error UI in 3 screens
- Fix admin station edit to save coordinates alongside details (single save)
- Add migration for update_station_coordinates NOT FOUND error handling
- Fix font-size !important override in +html.tsx
- Type FuelMap camera ref (remove `any`)
- Fix BottomSheet cursor: 'grab' type cast
- Fix BurgerMenu web-specific top offset via Platform.select
- Simplify price history limit to fixed constant
- Add edge case tests for formatPrice, formatDistance, formatDate
- Add formatOperatingHours and formatAmenity test coverage

All 52 tests pass.
